bug.description: scheduling priority inversion where lower-priority traffic is served before higher-priority

prompt:
There is a scheduling priority inversion where lower-priority traffic is served before higher-priority downstream of function nfapi_vnf_phy_info_list_find in the nfapi/open-nFAPI/vnf subsystem.
The function is located at nfapi/open-nFAPI/vnf/src/vnf.c:72.
Please investigate and fix this issue.
